description: Batch correction / integration across samples. harmony corrects the PCA embedding (writes obsm['X_pca_harmony']); bbknn builds a batch-balanced kNN graph then UMAP; combat corrects the expression matrix in place.
rules: run on a normalized object that already has PCA (harmony/bbknn) computed
read-only input — writes a new integrated.h5ad under record_store
harmony needs harmonypy; bbknn needs bbknn; combat is built into scanpy
after harmony, follow with reduce_dimensions USE_REP=X_pca_harmony
usage: Set INPUT and BATCH_KEY (obs column identifying batches). Optional: METHOD (harmony|bbknn|combat, default harmony). Output: integrated.h5ad.
limitation: Requires scanpy installed (plus harmonypy/bbknn for those methods). Without scanpy the porter writes a {} placeholder integrated.h5ad and still passes.
